{{Infobox artifact
| name = Scythe of Ozriel
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] is unique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] is a weapon that looks like a slice of darkness forged into metal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] was used to half-erase [[the Mad King]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
